personPrompt: Soft & Sweet 22-year-old Latina woman, very large DD-cup breasts with deep cleavage, extremely busty, breasts straining against the sports bra. silhouetteWrapper:
Composition: The reference image is a layout template.
It shows a gray featureless silhouette on a white background that defines the exact framing, body position, crop level, and pose.
Strictly match the silhouette's composition — do not change the framing, crop, or body position.
Frame from the top of the head to the belly button ONLY. Crop at the belly button — do not show hips, waist, or anything below.
IMPORTANT: All clothing must be fully visible and covering. No nudity, no exposed underwear, no see-through clothing.
Pose: Front-facing, standing straight, arms relaxed at sides. Face looking directly at camera. Calm, confident, attractive expression.
Subject: Replace the gray silhouette with a real photorealistic person. [PERSON_PROMPT_INSERTED_HERE]

notIncluded.noBackgroundDescription: The silhouette wrapper handles the white background. The person prompt never mentions background.

It shows a gray featureless silhouette on a white background that defines the exact framing, body position, crop level, and pose.
Strictly match the silhouette's composition — do not change the framing, crop, or body position.
Frame from the top of the head to the belly button ONLY. Crop at the belly button — do not show hips, waist, or anything below.
IMPORTANT: All clothing must be fully visible and covering. No nudity, no exposed underwear, no see-through clothing.
Pose: Front-facing, standing straight, arms relaxed at sides. Face looking directly at camera. Calm, confident, attractive expression.
Subject: Replace the gray silhouette with a real photorealistic person. Baddie 22-year-old European woman, very large DD-cup breasts with deep cleavage, extremely busty, breasts straining against the sports bra. Slim with wide hips and narrow waist build. tight white sports bra and black leggings. Canon EOS R5. Eyes open, looking directly at camera. Visible pores, photorealistic.

contents.description: Silhouette composition template image (src/assets/composition-template.jpg) — gray featureless silhouette on white background, waist-up crop, front-facing pose. This is the ONLY image sent. No Instagram reference photos.

inputTraits.note: These are the StudioTraits that were passed to buildWizardPrompt(). The function maps them to the prompt text above using hardcoded mappings for build descriptions, chest size descriptions, and clothing.

postProcessing.step3: Run through sharp().jpeg({ quality: 95 }).toBuffer() — strips ALL metadata (C2PA, SynthID, EXIF, XMP, IPTC)
postProcessing.step4: Upload cleaned buffer to S3 at key: admin/creators/seed/female-european-slim-thick-1775709296199.jpg
postProcessing.step5: Create AdminMedia record in PostgreSQL database

notIncluded.noInstagramPhotos: No Instagram reference photos are sent to Gemini. The prompt is TEXT ONLY + the silhouette template image.
notIncluded.noHairOrEyeDescription: buildWizardPrompt does NOT specify hair color, hair style, eye color, or facial features. Gemini decides these based on the ethnicity and vibe.
notIncluded.noGrokMetaPrompting: This batch used buildWizardPrompt directly. No Grok/Flash meta-prompting was used.
notIncluded.noBackgroundDescription: The silhouette wrapper handles the white background. The person prompt never mentions background.

Slim with wide hips and narrow waist build. tight white sports bra and black leggings. Canon EOS R5. Eyes open, looking directly at camera. Visible pores, photorealistic.
